Home Work
About Contact
Services

What I Do

I work with cultural institutions, independent businesses, and individuals to create visual work that communicates with precision and feeling.

01

Visual Identity

A complete brand system — not just a logo, but a visual language that works coherently across every context. From initial concept to final brand guidelines.

  • — Logo design & variations
  • — Colour palette & typography
  • — Brand guidelines document
  • — Stationery & business collateral
  • — Social media templates
02

Illustration

Original illustration for editorial, publishing, advertising, and cultural projects. Images that hold a distinct point of view and reward close attention.

  • — Editorial illustration
  • — Book & cover illustration
  • — Conceptual & campaign imagery
  • — Custom patterns & textures
  • — Digital and print-ready files
03

Print & Editorial

Posters, books, catalogues, and publications designed for the physical page. Typographic rigour and material awareness at every stage.

  • — Poster & exhibition design
  • — Book & catalogue layout
  • — Magazine & editorial design
  • — Event & cultural print
  • — Print-ready production files
Working Together

Every project begins with a conversation.

I take on a limited number of projects at a time to ensure each one receives full attention. If you have something in mind — a new brand, a book, an image — I'd love to hear about it.

Start a Project
LB

Visual identity · Illustration · Print design
